title: Google Contacts Node not returning correct labels
symptom: The Google Contacts Node is returning unique membership IDs instead of expected repeated labels for contacts. This leads to confusion as the memberships do not match the expected output.
not_this_if: Raw format flag is enabled in the node settings
root_cause: The Google Contacts Node may not return the expected repeated labels for contacts due to the raw format flag being disabled. This flag affects how the data is structured and returned, leading to discrepancies in the output.
fix_steps: Enable the raw format flag in the Google Contacts Node settings
In the filter node, use the expression '{{ $json.memberships.map(m => m.contactGroupMembership.contactGroupId) }}' to extract the correct membership IDs
agent_instruction: Enable the raw format flag in the Google Contacts Node and update the filter node expression.
